description: A designed graphic on a black background. The word 'ARRESTED' is in large orange italic capitals at the top. Below, framed in white, is a booking-style portrait of an older man with a thin gray beard wearing a red-and-white top. A white caption bar reads 'ILLEGAL ALIEN' and text beneath reads 'Convicted for premeditated murder, felony assault or battery on persons 65 years or older'. A White House wordmark is at the bottom.
notable_text: ARRESTED; ILLEGAL ALIEN; Convicted for premeditated murder, felony assault or battery on persons 65 years or older; The WHITE HOUSE
